schema_version.definition: Version of the starter schema used by the record.
schema_version.public_data_rule: Use the published version string so tools can detect schema changes.

record_id.public_data_rule: Never use real participant IDs in public datasets.

age_band.public_data_rule: Use broad bands to reduce re-identification risk.

country_code.public_data_rule: Country-level geography is acceptable for synthetic examples.

region.public_data_rule: Avoid exact addresses, villages, GPS, or small-community labels.

collection_month.definition: Month of collection or simulated collection.
collection_month.public_data_rule: Use month-level dates instead of exact collection or cycle dates.

cycle_length_days.definition: Reported or estimated cycle length in days.
cycle_length_days.public_data_rule: Use only synthetic values in public datasets.

period_duration_days.public_data_rule: Use only synthetic values in public datasets.

flow_heaviness.public_data_rule: Use controlled categories for validation and translation.

pain_score.public_data_rule: Use only synthetic values in public datasets.

reported_symptoms.definition: Semicolon-separated symptom labels from a controlled list.
reported_symptoms.public_data_rule: Avoid raw free text in public examples.

collection_method.definition: How the record was collected or simulated.
collection_method.public_data_rule: Public examples should be synthetic or fictional.

source_type.public_data_rule: Public row-level files should be synthetic unless explicitly approved as aggregate.
